purpose: Standalone smart prospecting plan generation skill package
runtime_output_policy: Use current working directory under 过程资料/项目名称 for process artifacts; never write into the source-material folder.
maintenance_rule: After changing scripts, references, templates, or assets, update VERSION, CHANGELOG.md, DEVELOPMENT_LOG.md, regenerate MANIFEST.json, and run self_test_skill.py plus verify_manifest.py.

files.path: CHANGELOG.md
